data.body: Evidence for AC2 (commit trailer): `git log -1 --format=%B -- docs/research/task-decomposition-sota-2026.md | grep -i 'rebar-ticket:'` outputs 'rebar-ticket: d39b-8c45-385c-418a'. The commit is 143d5074e on main, subject 'englacial-communal-conure: add task-decomposition SOTA report + plan-review gap analysis and recommendations', and its full message body ends with the trailer 'rebar-ticket: d39b-8c45-385c-418a'. Verified exit 0 at close time.
